title: Chaos Engineering Platform
description: Controlled chaos engineering platform: declarative experiments (CPU spike, network latency, AZ failure, DB partition), automated safety guards (rollback on P95 breach), experiment dashboard, blast-radius scoring, and steady-state hypothesis builder — all without writing infrastructure code.
features: Declarative experiments: inject CPU hog, memory pressure, network latency, AZ kill, DB partition via YAML
Automated safety guards: auto-abort and rollback on SLA breach or P95 threshold violation
Experiment history + roll-up steady-state score built automatically from past runs
Blast-radius estimation pre-run: ML model predicts blast radius across 200+ service dependencies
Blast radius visualisation: service dependency map showing hypothesised impact of failure
benefits: Prove resilience before incidents: catch single points of failure that $1M incident would surface too late
Run 20-50 automated experiments per month with zero manual engineering time
Security team approval gets faster: experiment results serve as evidence of resilience posture

title: Kubernetes Cost Optimizer
description: Right-sizing and workload-packing engine for Kubernetes clusters: real-time resource-right sizing per pod, spot-instance fallback for stateless workloads, automated HPA/VPA updates, chargeback/showback dashboards, and monthly bill reduction reports.
features: Right-sizing: ML-based recommendation for CPU/memory requests vs limits based on 7d usage window
Workload packing: improved cluster utilisation by consolidating bin-packed workloads across nodes
Spot-instance mixer: production workloads automatically use spot with on-demand fallback in same pool
VPA(re)writer: automated Vertical Pod Autoscaler merge proposals as PR per each workload
Showback/chargeback dashboards per-team, per-service, per-namespace from actual cluster usage
benefits: Reduce Kubernetes infrastructure costs 30-60% after right-sizing and spot-instance adoption
VPA auto-tuning frees 20-40% over-allocated CPU/memory — roomier pod budgets without changing limits
Team chargeback with real cluster usage data eliminates internal cost attribution disputes without finance overhead

title: Synthetic Data Generator & Privacy Shield
description: Generative synthetic data platform for ML training, software testing, and GDPR/CCPA privacy compliance: maintains statistical distributions of real data while producing 100% synthetic records that pass all real-world QA and validation tests without human PII.
features: Generative tabular model: preserves statistical distributions and edge-cases from real data
PII-free guarantee: no real person IDs, SSNs, phone numbers, addresses, or credit card numbers in output
Edge-case preservation: rare events, outliers, null patterns and multi-filed relationship preserved statistically
Schema evolution: same generator continues generating data from updated schema as schema evolves
SDV + CTGAN engine: zero-code, point-and-click configuration or full Python API
benefits: Ship ML models trained on higher-fidelity training data while staying GDPR/CCPA compliant — no PII exposure
Accelerate software testing: generate unlimited realistic test data matching production schema in one API call
CI/CD data pipeline: generate reproducible test data from production spec for integration and acceptance test suites

title: Social Media Content Hub & Publisher
description: All-in-one social media content hub: AI-assisted content ideation and drafting per platform, content calendar, multi-platform publishing (LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube), real-time engagement monitoring, and weekly performance reporting.
features: AI content drafting: platform-optimised posts per network with tone + brand voice pre-trained
Content calendar kanban: quarterly calendar with drag-drop scheduling per platform
Bulk publishing: schedule 50+ posts across 6 platforms in one session with platform-native format
Real-time engagement: mentions, DMs, comments all in one inbox with AI-suggested replies
Weekly performance report: top-performing content type, audience growth trend, best posting time slot
benefits: Social media managers publish 5× more content per week — AI drafts + bulk publish removes the bottleneck
Maintain consistent brand voice across all networks — tone-guided AI prevents rogue tone on LinkedIn vs TikTok
Cut time spent per week on content ideation and scheduling by 70-80%
